text:
はぁ……はぁっ……
貴方、精力的に活動しすぎ……
探す方の身にもなってよね。

って違う、こんなこと言うために
走り回っていたんじゃない！

どうしても
一緒に来て欲しい所があるの。

集合場所はここ、龍祭壇。
詳しい話は当日するから、よろしく。

……さて、次はあっちか。
ああもう、人使いが荒い！

あ、本当にお願いねっ！
悪いようにはしないから！

*huff* *huff* You have entirely way too much
energy. Try thinking of the people trying to
track you down, would'ja?

No wait, I didn't run all the way here
just to only say that!

There's somewhere you absolutely
have to come with me.

We'll meet up here at the Dragon Altar.
I'll fill you in on the day we meet, okay?

Right... Next stop is that way.
Ugh, how'd I end up with this job!

Oh, make sure you come meet me!
It's nothing bad, I promise!
